rulings.Case Title: PAUL A. VANDER WAERDT VS. CHARLES M. COLLINS et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, FEBRUARY 4, 2009. LINE 2, DEFENDANT VLADIE VILTMAN'S MOTION TO STRIKE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 26, 2009 BECAUSE DEMURRER AND MOTION MAY BECOME MOOT. ON JANUARY 30, 2009, THE COURT ISSUED AN ORDER ALLOWING PLAINTIFF TO FILE A SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. DEFENDANT VILTMAN MAY RESPOND TO PLAINTIFF'S SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT ONCE THAT IS FILED. =(302/CWW/PB)

rulings.Case Title: MARILEN MCINTYRE VS. SHERRY A. FONG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Strike Improper Damage Claims In First Amended Complaint

rulings.Case Title: NAGARAJ NAIDU VS. CALIFORNIA PUBLIC UTILITIES COMMISSION et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, FEBRUARY 4, 2009. LINE 6, DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PUBLIC UTILITIES COMMISSION'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. INSUFFICIENT FACTS ALLEGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAS EXHAUSTED HIS ADMINISTRATIVE REMEDIES. NATIONAL ORIGIN AND RELIGION ALLEGATIONS MUST BE STATED IN SEPARATE CAUSES OF ACTION. THE COMPLAINT IS UNCERTAIN AND AMBIGUOUS. PLAINTIFF IS GRANTED 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. =(302/CWW/VC)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, FEBRUARY 4, 2009. LINE 8, PETITIONER KATHRYN KIRKLAND'S Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award IS GRANTED. THE ARBITRATION AWARD IN THE AMOUNT OF $23,539.44 IS CONFIRMED. PLAINTIFF IS AWARDED POST-AWARD INTEREST AT THE RATE OF 10% PER ANNUM PLUS REASONABLE ATTORNEYS FEES AND COSTS INCURRED IN CONFIRMING THE AWARD IN THE AMOUNT OF $3,340.00. =(302/CWW/VC)

rulings.Case Title: BETTER PROPERTY MANAGEMENT VS. DAVID BENITAH et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Relief Under Ccp 473(A)(1)
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, FEBRUARY 4, 2009. LINE 9, PLAINTIFF BETTER PROPERTY MANAGEMENT'S Motion For Relief Under CCP 473(A)(1). MOTION DENIED. A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT EXISTS AS TO HOW MUCH RENT IS DUE PER THE RENTAL AGREEMENT. BROWN'S DECLARATION AUTHENICATES THE RENTAL AGREEMENT. OBJECTIONS TO EVIDENCE ARE MOOT. =(302/CWW/VC)
